ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the dataset was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source from which the dataset was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_metrics" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the energy metric */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "energy_sl" REAL /* Energy consumption lower bound */,
  "energy_sh" REAL /* Energy consumption upper bound */,
  "energy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of energy measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy consumption was measured */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific field where the energy was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_metrics_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES field_metrics ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_metrics" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the field metric */,
  "field" INTEGER /* Field measurement value */,
  "field_sl" REAL /* Field measurement lower bound */,
  "field_sh" REAL /* Field measurement upper bound */,
  "field_unit" TEXT /* Unit of field measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the field measurement was taken */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_metrics" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the yield metric */,
  "yield_value" REAL /* Yield value */,
  "yield_sl" REAL /* Yield lower bound */,
  "yield_sh" REAL /* Yield upper bound */,
  "yield_unit" TEXT /* Unit of yield measurement */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the yield was harvested */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific field where the yield was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_metrics_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES field_metrics ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_metrics" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the charge metric */,
  "charge_value" REAL /* Charge value */,
  "converted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether it was converted (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "excluded" INTEGER /* Indicates whether it was excluded (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "charge_unit" TEXT /* Unit of charge measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the charge was measured */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific field where the charge was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_metrics_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES field_metrics ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used to perform the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "field_characteristics" (
  "field_characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field characteristic entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the field characteristic */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the field */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions of the field */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Irrigation method used in the field */,
  "field_size" REAL /* Size of the field in the specified unit */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the field in meters */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the field in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_characteristics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
